final:
module simple_counter (
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input en,
  output reg [31:0] count
);

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
      count <= 0;
    end else if (en) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
